tasks.title: Wireshark TCP Handshake Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze a provided TCP stream and identify flags, sequence numbers, and the handshake.

tasks.title: Port Scanner Logic
tasks.description: Write pseudocode for a simple TCP connect() port scanner and explain its limitations.
